repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #94000 on its editable branch by fixing the Feishu drive pagination implementation in `extensions/feishu/src/drive.ts`, keeping the API surface narrow and preserving @ajwan8998 credit. The branch should correct the invalid property-assignment syntax, use the SDK-supported `page_size` / `page_token` / `next_page_token` / `has_more` contract, keep `info` scoped by optional folder token when supplied, and add focused regression coverage for cursor list paging plus multi-page info lookup.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary

Repair #94000 on the existing editable contributor branch. Keep the Feishu drive pagination fix narrow to `feishu_drive` `list` and `info`, fix the current TypeScript/lint failures in `extensions/feishu/src/drive.ts`, and add focused regression tests for cursor-based list paging and multi-page info lookup.

Credit: carries forward @ajwan8998's source PR #94000 and @yetval's issue report #93928.

## Repair Notes

- Current `main` at 591313e80a5e419e8a4d824cd8e8a6ae6689fb79 still calls `drive.file.list` once for both `list` and `info`.
- The Lark SDK contract supports `page_size`, `page_token`, `folder_token`, `has_more`, and `next_page_token` for `drive.file.list`.
- Fix the invalid property-assignment syntax in the PR branch and keep schema edits only if the branch still needs them for the user-facing pagination inputs.

## Verification

- `pnpm test extensions/feishu/src/drive.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- Codex `/review` before any later merge-enabled run
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for @ajwan8998 from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94000.
If a replacement PR becomes necessary despite maintainer_can_modify=true, name #94000 as the source PR and carry @ajwan8998 attribution in the PR body.
